description_long: This is a pair of low-top, casual sneakers with a mustard yellow suede or nubuck upper and white rubber soles. The shoes feature white laces threaded through metal eyelets and have visible double stitching along the sides and around the toe cap for added durability. The toe cap and sole are made of smooth white rubber, providing contrast to the textured yellow upper. The interior appears to be lined with a dark material, likely fabric or mesh, for comfort. The heel area is reinforced, and there is a small tag detail on the side of each shoe. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of mustard yellow low-top sneakers with white laces and rubber soles, featuring double stitching and a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded white toe caps, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow suede upper, double stitching, and the small side tag detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel, white rubber heel strip, and the dark interior lining.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile, stitching, and lacing details.
